title: Blox Template Definition
description: Schema for a BLOX template file. The root object stores the schema version, the template definition, and checkpoint metadata.

dependencyVersion.description: A dependency version requirement. Use either a single version number or a [minVersion, maxVersion] range.

oneOf.description: Inclusive version range expressed as [minVersion, maxVersion].

checkpoint.description: A saved checkpoint for a template or block, keyed by an arbitrary checkpoint name.

commit.description: The commit hash that identifies the checkpoint snapshot.

branch.description: Optional branch name associated with the checkpoint.

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON schema used for editor validation/autocompletion.

schemaVersion.description: Optional BLOX schema version for this file.

version.description: Optional major version for the template definition.

bases.description: Optional list of base templates that this template extends. Each entry can point to a specific version or a version range.

name.description: The name of the base template.

ignore.description: File patterns to ignore when initializing or updating the template.

init.description: Command to run after the template is initialized or added.

add.description: Command to run when this template is added to a project.

update.description: Command to run when this template is updated.

remove.description: Command to run when this template is removed.

checkpoints.description: Checkpoint records keyed by checkpoint name.

project.description: Optional project-level settings for the BLOX file.
